title: Fix Soft Crash When Adding Object from ERD View
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to add new objects from the ERD view without encountering errors, so that my workflow is not interrupted.
description:
## Bug
When viewing the Dictionary and clicking into the ERD to explore relationships, adding a new object caused a soft crash/error screen.

## Fix
Fixed the error handling in the add-object flow from the ERD context. Deployed to production.
acceptance_criteria: Adding a new object from the ERD view does not cause an error
New object appears correctly after being added
No crash or error page displayed during the flow
ux_changes: Fixed soft crash when adding objects from the ERD view.
middleware_changes: Fixed error handling in the add-object controller when invoked from the ERD context.
implementation_notes: Error occurred when adding objects from the ERD popup on the dictionary page. Fixed on production.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue on production.
